401.reason: [When a required terminal is missing, the parser should still consume a token or implement error recovery to avoid infinite loops. Currently, it returns without advancing the token stream, which may cause the same error to be reported repeatedly or parsing to stall.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error recovery fails: returns without consuming the mismatched token, causing infinite loops or repeated error reporting.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When a required terminal is missing, the parser should still consume a token or implement error recovery to avoid infinite loops. Currently, it returns without advancing the token stream, which may cause the same error to be reported repeatedly or parsing to stall.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When an expected terminal is missing, the parser should still consume a token to avoid infinite loops, but this code returns without advancing the token pointer]

978.reason: [This returns the line number of the previous token, but for missing symbol errors, the error should be reported on the line of the last successfully parsed token or current context, which might not always be index-1]
